## Human Review Checklist

- [ ] Findings are traceable to source documents
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, private keys, or customer data are included
- [ ] Diagrams use known systems from inventory
- [ ] Recommendations are actionable
- [ ] Risk levels are justified
- [ ] ADR required? Yes / No
- [ ] Exception required? Yes / No
- [ ] Relevant CODEOWNER reviewed
- [ ] AI-generated content is marked as draft where applicable

## Required Reviewers

- [ ] Enterprise Architecture
- [ ] Application Architecture
- [ ] Integration Architecture
- [ ] Data Architecture
- [ ] Security Architecture
- [ ] Infrastructure Architecture
- [ ] ARB

## Approval Note

AI-generated artifacts must not be treated as approved until reviewed and merged by authorized human reviewers.
